title: Storage Size Checker
description: Use sizeof to find the number of bytes a float occupies.
problemStatement:
Data types have different sizes in memory depending on the system. Use the `sizeof` operator to find out how many bytes a `float` occupies on your machine.

**Expected Output Example:** `Size of float: 4 bytes` (Note: %lu specifier is recommended for sizeof).
hints: The format specifier for `size_t` (the type returned by sizeof) is `%zu` (or `%lu`).
